title: Carry out emergency disease or pest control procedures on infected premises
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out emergency disease or pest control procedures on infected premises demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for emergency disease or pest control activities

pcs.text: Interpret work instructions from infected premises (IP) site supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret work instructions from infected premises (IP) site supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret work instructions from infected premises (IP) site supervisor.

pcs.text: Select and prepare appropriate equipment and materials to undertake control activities according to work instructions and workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and prepare appropriate equipment and materials to undertake control activities according to work instructions and workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare appropriate equipment and materials to undertake control activities according to work instructions and workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Select, check and use personal protective equipment (PPE)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and use personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and use personal protective equipment (PPE).

pcs.text: Identify and report potential ethical and animal welfare concerns to site supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report potential ethical and animal welfare concerns to site supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report potential ethical and animal welfare concerns to site supervisor.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement control activities according to standard operating procedures, workplace health and safety requirements and biosecurity standards and protocols.
